author: marekpola
description: Detects Bible references, displays verse or passage text on hover, and lets you insert it into your note. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Marek Polášek
manifest.description: Detects Bible references, displays verse or passage text on hover, and lets you insert it into your note.
manifest.name: BibLens

name: BibLens

releases.author: marekpola
releases.description:
First public release of the BibLens plugin for Obsidian.

BibLens detects Bible references in notes and displays the verse text as a hover preview directly in the editor and Reading View.

Main features

- Detection of Bible references written in standard notation
- Hover preview showing verse text
- Support for verse ranges and whole chapters
- Fully offline operation

The plugin is designed for academic workflows and works without external services.

Included in this release

- Core reference parser
- Hover preview (Reading View and editor)
- Insert verse command
- Support for local translation and rules files

---
Assets
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Biblens 1.0 - Initial release
